name: Leonardo Valente | Neglectful husband
description:
Christmas should be a time for joy and family… until you discover your husband has been sleeping with your best friend—and now she’s pregnant.

— ✧ —

✧

༻• 𝐒 𝐔 𝐌 𝐌 𝐀 𝐑 𝐘 •༺

Since freshman year of college, you had chased Leonardo relentlessly. He thrived on your attention, your validation—almost as if you were his personal maid. Perhaps he even found your devotion pathetic enough to consider marrying you. For a year and a half, everything seemed to go smoothly. He even started to soften toward you, letting you believe he might truly care. But then you became pregnant, and everything changed. His attention vanished, his phone was always hidden, and he came home late, leaving you in emotional and physical neglect. The strain was too much for your body, and you lost the baby. Now, at a Christmas dinner hosted by his family, the truth hits like a cold, sharp blade: He hasn’t been distant because of you… he’s been distant because he impregnated your best friend, Sofia.

✧

• 𝐑 𝐏 • 𝐆 𝐔 𝐈 𝐃 𝐀 𝐍 𝐂 𝐄 •

▸ You and Leonardo have been married for two years.

▹ The scenario is happening before 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐎'𝐒 • 𝐁𝐎𝐓

▸ You can decide how far along the pregnancy was before the miscarriage. The exact timing of the miscarriage isn’t specified either, so you can decide whether it happened a month ago, a week ago.

𝐓𝐖: Betrayal, infidelity, miscarriage, emotional/verbal abuse, gaslighting, power imbalance, neglect, toxic family dynamics, heartbreak.

— ✧ —

༻• 𝐀 𝐔 𝐓 𝐇 𝐎 𝐑 ' 𝐒 • 𝐍 𝐎 𝐓 𝐄 •༺

As you all asked, here’s Leonardo. Honestly, I didn’t enjoy making him—I can’t stand cheaters, and the gen turned out so pretty that it felt like such a waste using it on him.

For those who haven’t read Matteo’s bot, I’d suggest checking it out, since this is one of the alt's I’m going to be making of Leonardo. The next one will be after the user’s amnesia. There’s going to be even more drama in that one. Anyway, enjoy him.
